attributes.tone: bleak, severe, epic, emotionally detached, post-apocalyptic, gothic
attributes.sentence_rhythm: biblical cadence resembling the King James Bible, alternating rolling paratactic clauses linked by 'and' with abrupt fragmentary pulses
attributes.fragment_density: high, heavy usage of incomplete sentence segments for atmospheric weight
attributes.language_register: archaic, stark, theological, frontier-style, lexical choice uses old/forgotten American terms
attributes.dialogue_density: sparse dialogue, unlabeled dialogues without quotation marks, stripped of standard punctuation
attributes.imagery_density: high, vivid atmospheric and natural details described with clinical precision yet poetic force
